item.title: AND THE CIA IS TRYING TO MOBILIZE THE KURDSSSSS I feel like I’m speaking to like mythology right now because what do you mean yo...
item.description:
AND THE CIA IS TRYING TO MOBILIZE THE KURDSSSSS I feel like I’m speaking to like mythology right now because what do you mean you think it’s gonna free audience when America has never free people after WW2

item.title: This is a classic strategy of propaganda though because it doesn’t have to be consistent it has to be helpful and one side of th...
item.description:
This is a classic strategy of propaganda though because it doesn’t have to be consistent it has to be helpful and one side of this argument helped shield accountability and the other enables a slow but tolerable entrance of Zion is propaganda into the platform#greenscreenvideo

item.title: The Israelis are not the victims, they are a member of the perpetrating nation
item.description:
The Israelis are not the victims, they are a member of the perpetrating nation. So you can have empathy on an interpersonal level to individuals that’s fine, but in terms of political discussion be aware how that is misuse to justify the very systems of violence that caused this

item.description:
Replying to @coolbear please provide me the list because whenever we have done that it has destabilised and led to an authoritarian leadership and SUPER contentiously , Kosovo and Korea, but both were mass unaliving events
